arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Everton welcome Liverpool across town tonight for the final Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park. The famous old ground will be the stage for the Merseyside Derby for the last time this evening, in a huge clash for both teams. arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: The last-ever Merseyside derby at Goodison Park will be played in the Premier League tonight. Originally scheduled for December, the initial game was postponed after being impacted by the strong winds from Storm Darragh which made the conditions unplayable. arts.ttl: Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister ‘hopes to return to Argentina’ as he discusses future
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister has been a key figure for Liverpool since joining the club in the summer of 2023, but has hinted he could leave Anfield before the end of his playing days

arts.sum: Liverpool were dumped out of the FA Cup in the fourth round on Sunday and Roy Keane has insisted that the Reds will need to learn from the experience

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal confirm plans to sign Mo Salah this summer
arts.sum: And unless Liverpool convince the 32-year-old to sign a new contract soon, the Reds are ready to let him join the Saudi side immediately at the end of the European club season. According to GiveMeSport on Tuesday, Saudi Pro League side Al-Hilal want to sign Salah this summer on a free transfer.
